name: YieldTrillions
short_description: Hello, I'm a corn alien, I need to start the ship and go home, please V I have 10000000000 pounds of corn for spaceship fuel and I'll give you half a pound of popcorn as a reward when I get home.
detailed_description:
Hello, I'm a corn alien, I need to start the ship and go home, please V I have 10000000000 pounds of corn for spaceship fuel and I'll give you half a pound of popcorn as a reward when I get home.

Content

It is a 3D incremental idle game that requires careful care of the corn plant.

It will give you raw corn, green corn, blue corn, purple corn, pink corn, glowing baby corn, glowing green corn, glowing purple corn, glowing pink corn, glowing golden corn, super glowing green corn, super glowing purple corn, and many more.
